per_reg_comparisons.reasoning_short: REA concerns collecting data upon request and consent, while REG-059 requires providing information when personal data are obtained; these do not clearly express the same or directly conflicting constraint.

REA addresses collection of data upon request and consent, whereas REG-043 concerns oral provision of information when requested by the data subject; no quote-supported mismatch on the same constraint is present.

REA states that data are collected upon request and consent for providing services, while REG-145 concerns legislative measures containing provisions on categories of personal data; they are not the same or directly conflicting obligation.
